free_text: -RESONANCE ACTIVATION INTEGRALS OF SOME NUCLIDES OF
.JEEP II HEAVY WATER REACTOR AT KJELLER.
.EVAPORATED SAMPLE ON AL FOIL, ABOUT 0.5 TO 100 MICR-G
20 CM3 COAXIAL GE(LI) DETECTOR WITH A 2000-
CHANNEL PULSE HEIGHT ANALYSER,  RESOLUTION OF THE
DETECTOR SYSTEM IS 2.5 KEV(FWHM) FOR 1331 KEV OF CO60,
.EFFICIENCY WAS DETERMINED BY THE IAEA STANDARD SOURCE.
.CORRECTIONS FOR INDUCED ACTIVITIES IN THE FOIL WERE
